user.description: Sign in with your Tigo account (the same credentials as the Tigo mobile app).

data.premium: I have a Tigo EI Premium subscription

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tigo
reauth_confirm.description: Your Tigo token expired or was rejected. Enter your credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tigo cloud. Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Tigo system is already configured.

api_unreachable.title: Tigo cloud unreachable
api_unreachable.description: The Tigo cloud API has been failing for a while. Data is paused and will resume automatically when the service recovers; the integration is backing off and respecting any throttling.
